name: Marston and Clifton

locations.address:
Ashbourne Enquiry Office,
Compton Road,
Ashbourne,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Marston, Marston Montgomery, Alkmonton, Doveridge and Sudbury, the largest being Doveridge which has about 650 houses and a population of around 1,600. It belongs to the Derbyshire Dales Local Policing Unit.
